# 🚀 GO-LIVE CHECKLIST — 3 Human Money-Gates

*Generated by the Goal Director. The agent has built + automated everything
automatable (18 pipelines / 74 priced packages, affiliate site, listings,
Moltbook funnel, daily self-healing DevOps loop). Income can only START after
you complete the 3 gates below — they are legally / ToS-gated to a human and
the agent will never fake them.*

**Honesty contract (non-negotiable):**
- The agent automates **creation + publishing 100%**. Money still requires YOU,
  once, free: link payout, create marketplace accounts, click Publish.
- No traffic / no publish = no income. The system is the *engine*, not the fuel.
- Claim targets: realistic $3,000–$8,000/mo at 5 clients/pipeline once funnels
  warm. Not "unlimited" — scalable with audience × streams.

---

## GATE 1 — Marketplace accounts (Fiverr / Upwork)
**Why human:** ID verification + ToS. Agent cannot pass KYC.
- [ ] Create Fiverr account → https://www.fiverr.com (free)
- [ ] Create Upwork account → https://www.upwork.com (free)
- [ ] Verify ID on both (upload govt ID — agent cannot do this)
- [ ] Note your seller handle; keep it handy for Gate 3

**Agent-automated so far:** every gig's copy already exists as JSON in
`money/gigs/`, `money/*_packs/` and platform-ready `money/listings/<pack>/`.
You will paste, not write.

---

## GATE 2 — Payment linkage (how money reaches you)
**Why human:** bank / tax / PayPal ToS. Agent never stores payout creds.
- [ ] Fiverr: Profile → Earnings → Payout method → link PayPal or bank (UPI for IN)
- [ ] Upwork: Settings → Get Paid → add bank/UPI
- [ ] (Optional) Gumroad account → https://gumroad.com → link payout (for digital
      products in `money-engine`)
- [ ] (Optional) Amazon Associates → https://affiliate-program.amazon.in → paste
      your `tag` into `money-engine/config.json` `amazon_tag` (zero approval, IN-friendly)
- [ ] (Optional) UPI for DIRECT clients: `premkumar016555@oksbi` (put only in
      `PAYMENT.md`, never on public listings)

> Note: use a Merchant-of-Record (Gumroad/Polar) to avoid GST filings until threshold.

---

## GATE 3 — First gig publish (the revenue switch)
**Why human:** you click Publish; agent cannot.
1. Open `money/gigs/chatbot.json` (a ready gig: *"I will build you an AI customer
   support chatbot"*, tags `ai chatbot, customer support, chatwoot, n8n`).
2. Copy `gig_title` + the listing copy from `money/listings/gigs/chatbot/` into
   a new Fiverr gig.
3. Set price from `pricing` (or pick $80 starter / $300 standard / $800 premium).
4. Click **Publish**.
5. Repeat for 1–2 more high-margin packs (e.g. `retainer_packs/realestate` $4000,
   `voice_packs/dental` $1500) to seed recurring revenue.

**After publish:** reply here "first gig live" and the Director will:
- resume the Moltbook scheduler (after you claim the agent — see below),
- point the acquisition loop at your live gig URLs,
- watch for the first paid order and report it as revenue proof.

---

## UNCLAIMED-AGENT FIX (blocking the Moltbook funnel)
Posts from the unclaimed agent `prem-autonomous-co` get auto-flagged **"Spam"**
(score 0, buried) regardless of content. The scheduler is **paused** until fixed.
- [ ] Run in terminal: `python revenue/moltbook/moltbook.py register` (prints a
      one-time `claim_url`).
- [ ] Open `claim_url` in YOUR browser + verify with Twitter/X.
- [ ] Tell the Director "agent claimed" → it resumes the scheduler (every 3m,
      rate-limited, one post/tick).
